title: SACRAMENTO (June 18, 2025) – Assemblymember Diane Dixon (R-Newport Beach) is pleased to share that ten bills from her 2025 legislative package have passed to the State Senate.

raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "AB 349 requires the infant supplement formula, which parenting foster youth receive, to be indexed to inflation by matching the California Necessities Index (CNI).",
    "AB 484 will require the California State Bar to submit a report on whether adopting a uniform bar examination would increase efficiency and reduce costs for the State Bar and Examinees.",
    "AB 1239 will ensure that up-to-date and accurate data information is available on the arrests made for human trafficking and the number of people victimized by human trafficking.",
    "The most recent DOJ report on human trafficking was released in 2012.",
    "AB 965 will prohibit children under 16 years of age from purchasing a Class 3 E-Bike.",
    "AB 426 will prohibit civilian operation of drones at the scene of an emergency to provide secure airspace for first responders.",
    "AB 392 establishes safeguards to prohibit the non-consensual recording or sharing of explicit media and sexually explicit content of minors.",
    "AB 1272 prohibits the ability to use the DMV logogram, the acronym 'DMV' or the words 'Department of Motor Vehicles' in a website domain name."
  ]
}
```
